label: Note 02
title: El sol
body:
The sun shining over my skin. 
The warmth at first, the heat that stays after. 
It reminds me of someone. 
Her appearance at first glance was like the warmth from the sun. 
The memory associated with her is like the heat. 
Engine my whole being with the heat she left causally over my skin, settling somewhere deeper than the skin.
